title: ReserveCasePickActiveRebuild
fullText:
#===============================================================================================================
# Location Rebuild For Reserve, Case Pick, and Active Location Inventory
# Revision History/Notes:
#
#===============================================================================================================

cd /apps/scope/products/WM/cbs
. ./pkms.env
if [[ $# -ne 3 ]]; then
 echo "" 
 echo "--> DBuserid, DBpassword, oracleSid are required."
 echo " Usage: []$ . LocationRebuildForReserve.sh <username> <password> <oracle_sid>"
 echo "" 

else
 v_username=$1
 v_userpass=$2
 v_orasid=$3
 
 archrsltR=`sqlplus -L -s $v_username/$v_userpass@${v_orasid}<<EOF
set serveroutput on feedback off heading off verify off
declare
MinMax Varchar2(100);
begin
 select './PkRebuildCommandC -w '||MIN(WHSE)||' -u WMADMIN -l R -f ' ||min(LOCN_BRCD)||' -t '|| max(LOCN_BRCD) into MinMax from locn_hdr where locn_class='R';

 dbms_output.put_line(MinMax);
end;
/
quit;
EOF`
archrsltC=`sqlplus -L -s $v_username/$v_userpass@${v_orasid}<<EOF
set serveroutput on feedback off heading off verify off
declare
MinMax Varchar2(100);
begin
 select './PkRebuildCommandC -w '||MIN(WHSE)||' -u WMADMIN -l C -f ' ||min(LOCN_BRCD)||' -t '|| max(LOCN_BRCD) into MinMax from locn_hdr where locn_class='R';

 dbms_output.put_line(MinMax);
end;
/
quit;
EOF`
archrsltA=`sqlplus -L -s $v_username/$v_userpass@${v_orasid}<<EOF
set serveroutput on feedback off heading off verify off
declare
MinMax Varchar2(100);
begin
 select './PkRebuildCommandC -w '||MIN(WHSE)||' -u WMADMIN -l A -f ' ||min(LOCN_BRCD)||' -t '|| max(LOCN_BRCD) into MinMax from locn_hdr where locn_class='R';

 dbms_output.put_line(MinMax);
end;
/
quit;
EOF`
echo "${archrsltR}"
echo "${archrsltC}"
echo "${archrsltA}"
cd /apps/scope/products/WM/cbs
. ./pkms.env
cd /apps/scope/products/WM/cbs/bin
${archrsltR}
${archrsltC}
${archrsltA}
retcode=$?
if (($retcode > 1)); then
 echo "LocationRebuildForReserve.sh exit code is:$retcode"
 exit 1
fi
#Normal exit
echo "Exit with code: $retcode"
 echo "Done." 
fi
